scripts.build: bun build src/main.ts --compile --minify --outfile m1craft && codesign --sign - --force --timestamp=none m1craft
scripts.package: bun build src/main.ts --compile --minify --outfile m1craft && codesign --sign - --force --timestamp=none m1craft && zip -j m1craft-macos-arm64.zip m1craft README.md
